---
date: 2026/06/19
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
listing:
  - id: functions
    max-description-length: 100
    fields: [title]
    contents: "Functions"
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: true
---

# Code Reference

This page documents the custom R functions used across the BIODYNAMICS vegetation co-occurrence project.
Function pages are generated from roxygen2 documentation and should not be edited manually.

## Function Categories

| Category | Role |
|---|---|
| Community | Paleo and modern community extraction, reshaping, interpolation, filtering, and aggregation |
| Taxonomy | GBIF-backed classification, manual correction tables, and taxonomic-resolution routing |
| Traits | Trait extraction, quality control, correction, clustering, and functional-type classification |
| Abiotic | Climate extraction, interpolation, collinearity screening, and scaling |
| Modelling | Model input assembly, `{sjSDM}` fitting, evaluation, MEMs, and variance decomposition |
| Prediction | Spatial and temporal prediction helpers, prediction grids, and animation outputs |
| Pipeline | Configuration access, target-store readers, progress visualisation, and runner utilities |
| Visualisation | Plot builders, project palettes, presentation helpers, and reporting utilities |

The active pipeline entry points live in `R/Pipelines/`.
Reusable pipeline construction blocks live in `R/Pipelines/_pipes/`.
The generated reference below links the lower-level functions used by those pipelines.

## All Functions

::: {#functions}
:::

## Code Coverage

Tests are written with [{testthat}](https://testthat.r-lib.org/) and coverage is measured with [{covr}](https://covr.r-lib.org/).
Coverage is computed per function and aggregated across the project.

Current coverage:
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OndrejMottl/BIODYNAMICS-vegetation-cooccurrence/main/Documentation/Functions_test_coverage/covr_report_summary.json&query=$.value&label=codecov&color=orange&style=flat-square&suffix=%25)

Full interactive coverage report:

<iframe
  src="/Documentation/Functions_test_coverage/covr_report.html"
  width="100%"
  height="500px"
  style="border:none;">
</iframe>
